title: Solar Graphic
description: Ce style se définit par son esthétique graphique plate et baignée de soleil, rappelant les affiches de voyage vintage du milieu du siècle et les illustrations City Pop. Il utilise des blocs de couleurs opaques et non fondus, hautement saturés, avec des bords nets et sans contours visibles, créant des formes entièrement grâce à un éclairage intense et des ombres portées très découpées. Le résultat est une atmosphère immaculée, tranquille et vivement stylisée avec une finition parfaitement lisse et mate.
description_en: This style is defined by its sun-drenched, high-contrast flat graphic aesthetic, reminiscent of mid-century vintage travel posters and City Pop illustrations. It employs opaque, unblended blocks of highly saturated colors with razor-sharp edges and no visible linework, creating forms entirely through high-key lighting and stark, hard-edged cast shadows. The result is a pristine, tranquil, and vividly stylized atmosphere with a perfectly smooth, matte finish.
description_fr: Ce style se définit par son esthétique graphique plate et baignée de soleil, rappelant les affiches de voyage vintage du milieu du siècle et les illustrations City Pop. Il utilise des blocs de couleurs opaques et non fondus, hautement saturés, avec des bords nets et sans contours visibles, créant des formes entièrement grâce à un éclairage intense et des ombres portées très découpées. Le résultat est une atmosphère immaculée, tranquille et vivement stylisée avec une finition parfaitement lisse et mate.
prompt: Flat graphic illustration, pristine opaque gouache digital painting, evoking the sun-drenched aesthetic of mid-century vintage travel posters and serene City Pop art. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The rendering relies entirely on crisp, unblended color blocking with absolutely no gradients, where shading is achieved through distinct, hard-edged planar color bands. Lighting is characterized by harsh, direct midday sunlight, creating a stark directional key light that casts distinctive, razor-sharp geometric shadows. These shadows often carry cool-toned tints that contrast sharply against brightly lit surfaces. The color science features a high-key, highly saturated, and vibrant palette, utilizing {{primary_color}} as the dominant luminous base, punctuated by intensely vibrant {{accent_color}} focal elements, and grounded by {{secondary_color}} supporting details. Texture is perfectly smooth and uniformly matte, with zero visible brushstrokes, noise, or film grain. Edge treatment is immaculate; forms exhibit clean-cut, vector-like silhouettes and are defined exclusively by high-contrast color boundaries rather than drawn outlines, strictly avoiding any black linework. The composition utilizes planar overlapping of flat shapes to establish depth, conveying a tranquil, frozen-in-time atmosphere of a pristine, sun-baked afternoon. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. flat illustration, opaque gouache, sun-drenched, hard-edged shadows, vintage travel poster, vector art, color blocking, high contrast, geometric precision, unblended colors, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: Flat graphic illustration and pristine opaque gouache digital painting of a serene, sun-drenched environment devoid of any central subjects. The scene features sweeping architectural planes or stylized natural landscapes rendered with crisp, unblended color blocking and razor-sharp geometric shadows cast by harsh midday sunlight. The palette utilizes a luminous {{primary_color}} base, vibrant {{accent_color}} highlights, and grounded {{secondary_color}} structural elements. Perfectly smooth matte textures, high-contrast color boundaries, and a tranquil, frozen-in-time atmosphere dominate the expansive, borderless composition.
background_prompt_removebg: Flat graphic illustration and pristine opaque gouache digital painting of a serene, sun-drenched environment devoid of any central subjects. The scene features sweeping architectural planes or stylized natural landscapes rendered with crisp, unblended color blocking and razor-sharp geometric shadows cast by harsh midday sunlight. The palette utilizes a luminous {{primary_color}} base, vibrant {{accent_color}} highlights, and grounded {{secondary_color}} structural elements. A stylized foreground architectural archway or geometric border overlays the scene, rendered in the same flat graphic style to create depth. The entire environmental composition and foreground frame transition sharply into a flat {{background_color}} backdrop, creating a multi-layered diorama effect against the solid surface.
